title: The Factory Battle Continues
description: Pages 4–8 focus on the factory battle continues, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, King Riku, Kyros, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the Smile Factory and the remaining officers become the last obstacles before Luffy can fully confront Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The gigantic, menacing rock has begun to move!! The King is in a bind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...but how the hell are we supposed to stop some- thing like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We can't let him just go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop, you Frickin' rocks-for-brained beast!!! That plateau...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Not that it has anything to do with us, but I don't get it at all...

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: It's just as the "pirate Hunter" said...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm glad I held onto my "king punch"!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: I'll save you now, King Riku, my friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hold it right there, King of... somewhere or other!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I told you, it's useless try- ing to just break that thing into pieces!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I am the King of Prodence, Elizabetho...!! "Pirate Hunter"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Unless we defeat the main body, he'll keep regenerating himself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: If you are talking to me, it's "admiral"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You were throwing people like bullets just now, weren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If you're looking for me, here I am!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Please, no more carnage!! Just stop this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hurry, run!!! Get off of this plateau!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: tank, Viola!! Get everyone off this plateau, quickly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The one he's after is me!! Now, go!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: That's exactly why you should be running, King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: "Pirate Hunter" orlumbus!! What the hell is he planning on doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: This ain't 'xactly a skill meant to toss people safely, y'know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Just do it, already!! We're running out of time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: That BAS- TARD is only going after people that don't wanna fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You are no King of mine....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Nothing about you is fit to be King....!!!

summary: The Factory Battle Continues advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, King Riku, Kyros, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
